name: Finding Diamonds
description: Diamonds generate most commonly between Y=-64 and Y=16, with peak frequency around Y=-59. Strip mine at Y=-59 with an iron or better pickaxe. Place torches to prevent mob spawns.

name: Finding Iron
description: Iron ore generates from Y=-64 to Y=72, with large blobs above ground in mountains. Use a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt raw iron into ingots.

name: Finding Coal
description: Coal ore is common from Y=0 to Y=128 and exposed in mountains. Mine with any pickaxe. Use coal for torches and furnace fuel.

name: Beating the Game
description: The standard progression is: gather wood, make tools, mine iron, get diamonds, make a diamond pickaxe, build a nether portal, find a fortress, collect blaze rods, craft eyes of ender, locate a stronghold, enter the End, and defeat the Ender Dragon.

name: Finding a Nether Fortress
description: Nether fortresses generate in lines along the Z axis in the Nether. Travel north or south along the Z axis, or use the /locate command if cheats are enabled. Blazes and Nether Wart spawn inside.

name: Locating a Stronghold
description: Throw eyes of ender and follow the direction they fly. Eyes of ender have a chance to break when thrown. Strongholds generate underground, often under villages or other surface features.

name: Defeating the Ender Dragon
description: Destroy the obsidian towers with end crystals first. Use a bow or bed explosions to damage the dragon when it perches. Avoid dragon breath and stay away from the dragon's head when it charges.

name: Strip Mining
description: Dig long horizontal tunnels at the target Y level, leaving 2 blocks between tunnels to expose the maximum number of blocks. Use a pickaxe and carry plenty of torches and food.

name: Surviving the First Night
description: Punch wood, craft a crafting table and wooden pickaxe, mine stone for tools, gather coal or make charcoal, build a small shelter or dig into a wall, and place torches to survive until morning.

name: Farming
description: Till dirt near water with a hoe, plant seeds, and wait for crops to grow. Bonemeal speeds growth. Harvest fully grown crops and replant. Light the farm to prevent mob trampling.

name: Villager Trading
description: Assign villagers a workstation to set their profession. Trade emeralds for items. Protect villagers with walls, lights, and iron golems. Refresh trades by breaking and replacing workstations.

name: Enchanting
description: Build an enchanting table from 2 diamonds, 4 obsidian, and 1 book. Place bookshelves around it for higher level enchantments. Lapis lazuli is required for enchanting.

name: Getting Netherite
description: Mine ancient debris in the Nether at Y=15 using a diamond or netherite pickaxe. Smelt it into netherite scrap. Combine 4 scrap with 4 gold ingots to make a netherite ingot. Upgrade diamond gear at a smithing table.

name: Breeding Animals
description: Feed two animals their preferred food (wheat for cows, carrots for pigs, seeds for chickens) to make them breed and produce a baby. Build a pen to keep them contained.

name: Mining Safety
description: Never dig straight down. Carry water to turn lava into obsidian. Place torches to prevent mobs. Keep food and spare tools. Watch for gravel and sand that can suffocate you.
